title: Israeli drone strikes near Beirut kill 4, southern airstrikes kill 13+ — Day 23 of ceasefire
snippet: Three Israeli drone strikes on vehicles south of Beirut kill 4. Southern Lebanon airstrikes kill 13+, including a man and his 12-year-old daughter in Nabatieh, 7 in al-Saksakieh including a child. Total 19+ killed on Day 23 of ceasefire. Drone strikes near Beirut mark further escalation.
tag_reason: New day's casualty toll; drone strikes near Beirut escalation not previously reported
